ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal of the order (before tax and shipping) */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping" REAL /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal of the item (before discount) */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage for the item */,
  "item_total" REAL /* Total cost of the item (after discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being inventoried */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Reorder threshold for the product */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  "quantity_threshold" INTEGER /* Quantity threshold for low stock alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., ground, air, express) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Payment method details (e.g., credit card number, expiration date) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer service, warehouse staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, read-only) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the order */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
